# REAVIZ

> A modular, enterprise-grade data visualization library for React built on D3. 22+ chart types with native React rendering, Motion animations, full customization via JSX props, and accessibility support. Apache-2.0 licensed.

- Built on D3 for calculations, React for rendering — not a wrapper
- Every chart element accepts JSX props for deep customization
- Ships with 50+ pre-built Blocks (composable chart patterns)
- Motion-powered animations out of the box
- Supports TypeScript natively
- Install: `npm i reaviz`
- Compared to recharts/nivo: reaviz offers more chart variety (sankey, heatmap, venn, radial gauges, treemap, sunburst, word cloud) with lower-level customization access

---

## Getting Started

### Installation

```bash
npm install reaviz --save
```

Also available via yarn, pnpm, or bun:
```bash
yarn add reaviz
pnpm add reaviz
bun add reaviz
```

### Requirements

- React v16+ and ReactDOM
- Does not support React Native

### CSS Variables

REAVIZ uses CSS variables for theming. These are not applied automatically — you must set sensible defaults in your global styles:

```css
:root {
  --color-tooltip-background: #1a1a2e;
  --color-tooltip-color: #ffffff;
  --color-tooltip-border-radius: 4px;
  --color-tooltip-padding: 8px;
  --color-handle-fill: #2d60e8;
  --color-handle-stroke: #1a1a2e;
  --color-handle-drag: #2d60e8;
  --color-handle-dots: #ffffff;
  --color-handle-line: #2d60e8;
}
```

---

## Data Shapes

REAVIZ uses two primary data shapes for chart input:

### ChartShallowDataShape (Single Series)

Used by: BarList, BubbleChart, FunnelChart, LinearGauge, Meter, PieChart, ScatterPlot, SparklineChart, SunburstChart, TreeMap, WordCloud.

```typescript
interface ChartShallowDataShape {
  key: string | number | Date;
  data: number | string | Date | [number, number];
  metadata?: any;
}
```

Example:
```typescript
const data = [
  { key: 'Jan', data: 100 },
  { key: 'Feb', data: 200 },
  { key: 'Mar', data: 150 }
];
```

For date-based axes:
```typescript
const dateData = [
  { key: new Date('2024-01-01'), data: 100 },
  { key: new Date('2024-02-01'), data: 200 },
  { key: new Date('2024-03-01'), data: 150 }
];
```

### ChartNestedDataShape (Multi Series)

Used by: Multi-series AreaChart, BarChart (grouped/stacked), Heatmap, RadarChart.

```typescript
interface ChartNestedDataShape {
  key: string | number | Date;
  data: ChartShallowDataShape[];
  metadata?: any;
}
```

Example:
```typescript
const multiSeriesData = [
  {
    key: 'Series 1',
    data: [
      { key: new Date('2024-01-01'), data: 100 },
      { key: new Date('2024-02-01'), data: 200 }
    ]
  },
  {
    key: 'Series 2',
    data: [
      { key: new Date('2024-01-01'), data: 150 },
      { key: new Date('2024-02-01'), data: 250 }
    ]
  }
];
```

### ChartDataShape (Union)

```typescript
type ChartDataShape = ChartShallowDataShape | ChartNestedDataShape;
```

---

## Base Chart Props (ChartProps)

All chart components extend this base interface:

```typescript
interface ChartProps {
  /** Chart ID */
  id?: string;
  /** Chart width in pixels. Auto-sizes if not provided. */
  width?: number;
  /** Chart height in pixels. Auto-sizes if not provided. */
  height?: number;
  /** Margins around the chart area: { top, bottom, left, right } */
  margins?: { top?: number; bottom?: number; left?: number; right?: number };
  /** CSS class for the SVG element */
  className?: string;
  /** CSS class for the container div */
  containerClassName?: string;
  /** Style for the SVG element */
  style?: React.CSSProperties;
  /** Center both axes */
  center?: boolean;
  /** Center X axis only */
  centerX?: boolean;
  /** Center Y axis only */
  centerY?: boolean;
}
```

---

## Charts

### Area Chart

Single/multi-series area charts with stacking and interpolation options.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/area-chart

**Variants:** AreaChart (single/multi), StackedAreaChart, StackedNormalizedAreaChart

**Props:**
```typescript
interface AreaChartProps extends ChartProps {
  /** Data the chart will receive to render. */
  data: ChartDataShape[];
  /** The series component that renders the area/line/circles. */
  series: ReactElement<AreaSeriesProps, typeof AreaSeries>;
  /** The linear axis component for the Y Axis. */
  yAxis: ReactElement<LinearAxisProps, typeof LinearAxis>;
  /** The linear axis component for the X Axis. */
  xAxis: ReactElement<LinearAxisProps, typeof LinearAxis>;
  /** The chart's background gridlines. */
  gridlines: ReactElement<GridlineSeriesProps, typeof GridlineSeries> | null;
  /** The chart's brush component for selection. */
  brush: ReactElement<ChartBrushProps, typeof ChartBrush> | null;
  /** The chart's zoom pan component. */
  zoomPan: ReactElement<ChartZoomPanProps, typeof ChartZoomPan> | null;
  /** Secondary axis components for multi-axis charts. */
  secondaryAxis?: ReactElement<LinearAxisProps, typeof LinearAxis>[];
}
```

**Default values:**
- `xAxis`: `<LinearXAxis type="time" />`
- `yAxis`: `<LinearYAxis type="value" />`
- `series`: `<AreaSeries />`
- `gridlines`: `<GridlineSeries />`
- `brush`: `null`
- `zoomPan`: `null`

**Basic usage:**
```tsx
import { AreaChart, AreaSeries, Line } from 'reaviz';

const data = [
  { key: new Date('2024-01-01'), data: 100 },
  { key: new Date('2024-02-01'), data: 200 },
  { key: new Date('2024-03-01'), data: 150 }
];

<AreaChart
  width={350}
  height={250}
  data={data}
  series={
    <AreaSeries
      interpolation="linear"
      colorScheme="cybertron"
      line={<Line strokeWidth={4} />}
    />
  }
/>
```

---

### Bar Chart

Vertical/horizontal bars, grouped, stacked, waterfall, marimekko, histogram.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/bar-chart

**Variants:** BarChart, StackedBarChart, StackedNormalizedBarChart, MarimekkoChart, HistogramBarChart

**Props:**
```typescript
interface BarChartProps extends ChartProps {
  /** Data the chart will receive to render. */
  data: ChartDataShape[];
  /** The series component that renders the bar components. */
  series: ReactElement<BarSeriesProps, typeof BarSeries>;
  /** The linear axis component for the Y Axis. */
  yAxis: ReactElement<LinearAxisProps, typeof LinearAxis>;
  /** The linear axis component for the X Axis. */
  xAxis: ReactElement<LinearAxisProps, typeof LinearAxis>;
  /** The chart's background gridlines. */
  gridlines: ReactElement<GridlineSeriesProps, typeof GridlineSeries> | null;
  /** The chart's brush component. */
  brush: ReactElement<ChartBrushProps, typeof ChartBrush> | null;
  /** Secondary axis components for multi-axis charts. */
  secondaryAxis?: ReactElement<LinearAxisProps, typeof LinearAxis>[];
}
```

**Default values:**
- `xAxis`: `<LinearXAxis type="category" tickSeries={<LinearXAxisTickSeries tickSize={20} />} />`
- `yAxis`: `<LinearYAxis type="value" />`
- `series`: `<BarSeries />`
- `gridlines`: `<GridlineSeries />`

**Basic usage:**
```tsx
import { BarChart, BarSeries, Bar } from 'reaviz';

const data = [
  { key: 'DLP', data: 13 },
  { key: 'SIEM', data: 2 },
  { key: 'Mail', data: 8 },
  { key: 'Mail', data: 5 }
];

<BarChart
  width={400}
  height={350}
  data={data}
  series={<BarSeries padding={0.1} bar={<Bar />} />}
/>
```

**Stacked Bar Chart:**
```tsx
import { StackedBarChart, StackedBarSeries, Bar } from 'reaviz';

<StackedBarChart
  width={400}
  height={350}
  data={multiSeriesData}
  series={<StackedBarSeries bar={<Bar />} />}
/>
```

**Horizontal Bar Chart:**
```tsx
import { BarChart, BarSeries, Bar, LinearXAxis, LinearYAxis } from 'reaviz';

<BarChart
  width={400}
  height={350}
  data={data}
  xAxis={<LinearXAxis type="value" />}
  yAxis={<LinearYAxis type="category" />}
  series={<BarSeries layout="horizontal" bar={<Bar />} />}
/>
```

---

### Bar List

Simple horizontal bar lists for rankings and comparison.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/bar-list

**Props:**
```typescript
interface BarListProps {
  /** ID for the chart. */
  id?: string;
  /** CSS Classname for the element. */
  className?: string;
  /** Style for the element. */
  style?: React.CSSProperties;
  /** Data for the chart. */
  data: ChartShallowDataShape[];
  /** Sort direction of the data. */
  sortDirection?: 'asc' | 'desc' | 'none';
  /** Series to render. */
  series?: ReactElement<BarListSeriesProps, typeof BarListSeries>;
  /** Whether values are percentages or absolute. */
  type?: 'percent' | 'count';
}
```

**Basic usage:**
```tsx
import { BarList } from 'reaviz';

<BarList
  style={{ width: 350 }}
  data={[
    { key: 'Vulnerability Patch', data: 50 },
    { key: 'Critical Failure', data: 25 },
    { key: 'Physical Intrusion', data: 5 },
    { key: 'Phishing Attempts', data: 100 }
  ]}
/>
```

---

### Bubble Chart

Scatter-based bubble visualizations using circle packing.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/bubble-chart

**Props:**
```typescript
interface BubbleChartProps extends ChartProps {
  /** Data the chart will receive to render. */
  data: ChartShallowDataShape[];
  /** The series component that renders the arc components. */
  series?: ReactElement<BubbleSeriesProps, typeof BubbleSeries>;
}
```

**Basic usage:**
```tsx
import { BubbleChart, BubbleSeries } from 'reaviz';

<BubbleChart
  data={[
    { key: 'AWS', data: 100 },
    { key: 'SendGrid', data: 45 },
    { key: 'Okta', data: 75 },
    { key: 'Twilio', data: 25 }
  ]}
  height={450}
  width={450}
  series={<BubbleSeries colorScheme="cybertron" />}
/>
```

---

### Funnel Chart

Conversion funnel visualizations for pipeline/process data.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/funnel-chart

**Props:**
```typescript
interface FunnelChartProps extends ChartProps {
  /** Data the chart will receive to render. */
  data: ChartShallowDataShape[];
  /** The series component that renders the funnel components. */
  series: ReactElement<FunnelSeriesProps, typeof FunnelSeries>;
}
```

**Basic usage:**
```tsx
import { FunnelChart } from 'reaviz';

<FunnelChart
  height={300}
  width={500}
  data={[
    { key: 'Visited Site', data: 1000 },
    { key: 'Added to Cart', data: 900 },
    { key: 'Initiated Checkout', data: 600 },
    { key: 'Purchased', data: 400 }
  ]}
/>
```

---

### Heatmap

Calendar and matrix heatmaps for two-dimensional data.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/heatmap

**Props:**
```typescript
interface HeatmapProps extends ChartProps {
  /** Data the chart will receive to render. */
  data: ChartNestedDataShape[];
  /** The series component that renders the cell components. */
  series: ReactElement<HeatmapSeriesProps, typeof HeatmapSeries>;
  /** The linear axis component for the Y Axis. */
  yAxis: ReactElement<LinearAxisProps, typeof LinearAxis>;
  /** The linear axis component for the X Axis. */
  xAxis: ReactElement<LinearAxisProps, typeof LinearAxis>;
  /** Secondary axis components for multi-axis charts. */
  secondaryAxis?: ReactElement<LinearAxisProps, typeof LinearAxis>[];
}
```

**Basic usage:**
```tsx
import { Heatmap, HeatmapSeries } from 'reaviz';

<Heatmap
  height={250}
  width={400}
  data={heatmapData}
  series={<HeatmapSeries colorScheme="OrRd" />}
/>
```

**Data format (nested):**
```typescript
const heatmapData = [
  {
    key: 'Row 1',
    data: [
      { key: 'Col A', data: 10 },
      { key: 'Col B', data: 25 },
      { key: 'Col C', data: 5 }
    ]
  },
  {
    key: 'Row 2',
    data: [
      { key: 'Col A', data: 15 },
      { key: 'Col B', data: 30 },
      { key: 'Col C', data: 20 }
    ]
  }
];
```

---

### Line Chart

Single/multi-series line charts. LineChart is a wrapper around AreaChart with a LineSeries.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/line-chart

**Props:** Same as AreaChartProps (LineChart is a type alias for AreaChart with LineSeries default).

**Basic usage:**
```tsx
import { LineChart, LineSeries, Line } from 'reaviz';

const data = [
  { key: new Date('2024-01-01'), data: 100 },
  { key: new Date('2024-02-01'), data: 200 },
  { key: new Date('2024-03-01'), data: 150 }
];

<LineChart
  width={350}
  height={250}
  data={data}
  series={
    <LineSeries
      interpolation="linear"
      colorScheme="cybertron"
      line={<Line strokeWidth={4} />}
    />
  }
/>
```

---

### Linear Gauge

Linear gauge/progress indicators for displaying a value within a range.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/linear-gauge

**Props:**
```typescript
interface LinearGaugeProps extends ChartProps {
  /** Data the chart will receive to render. */
  data: ChartShallowDataShape | ChartShallowDataShape[];
  /** The series component that renders the bar components. */
  series: ReactElement<LinearGaugeSeriesProps, typeof LinearGaugeSeries>;
  /** Min value to scale on. Only applicable for single-series. */
  minValue: number;
  /** Max value to scale on. Only applicable for single-series. */
  maxValue: number;
}
```

**Default values:**
- `minValue`: `0`
- `maxValue`: `100`
- `series`: `<LinearGaugeSeries />`

**Basic usage:**
```tsx
import { LinearGauge } from 'reaviz';

<LinearGauge
  height={30}
  width={300}
  data={{ key: 'Risk Score', data: 80 }}
/>
```

---

### Map

Geographic map visualizations using TopoJSON/GeoJSON data.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/map

**Props:**
```typescript
interface MapProps extends ChartProps {
  /** Map marker elements. */
  markers?: ReactElement<MapMarkerProps, typeof MapMarker>[];
  /** GeoJSON/TopoJSON data for the map. */
  data: any;
  /** Fill color for the map regions. */
  fill?: string;
  /** Map projection type. */
  projection?: 'mercator' | 'natural-earth';
}
```

**Basic usage:**
```tsx
import { Map } from 'reaviz';
import { feature } from 'topojson-client';
import geojson from 'world-atlas/countries-110m.json';

const worldData = feature(geojson, geojson.objects.countries);

<Map data={worldData} height={350} width={500} />
```

**Dependencies:** Requires `topojson-client` and `world-atlas` packages.

---

### Meter

Meter/progress visualizations with discrete column indicators.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/meter

**Props:**
```typescript
interface MeterProps {
  /** The value of the meter. */
  value: number;
  /** The minimum value. */
  min?: number;
  /** The maximum value. */
  max?: number;
  /** The number of columns to display. */
  columns?: number;
  /** Additional class names. */
  className?: string;
  /** The gap between columns. */
  gap?: number;
  /** Additional styles. */
  style?: React.CSSProperties;
  /** The column component to render. */
  column: ReactElement<MeterColumnProps, typeof MeterColumn> | null;
}
```

**Default values:**
- `min`: `0`
- `max`: `100`
- `columns`: `10`
- `gap`: `15`

**Basic usage:**
```tsx
import { Meter } from 'reaviz';

<Meter value={50} style={{ width: 300 }} />
```

---

### Pie Chart

Pie and donut charts for proportional data.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/pie-chart

**Props:**
```typescript
interface PieChartProps extends ChartProps {
  /** Data the chart will receive to render. */
  data?: ChartShallowDataShape[];
  /** Whether the chart is disabled. */
  disabled?: boolean;
  /** Whether to display labels even if their value has a small display radius. */
  displayAllLabels?: boolean;
  /** The series component that renders the arc components. */
  series?: ReactElement<PieArcSeriesProps, typeof PieArcSeries>;
}
```

**Basic usage (Pie):**
```tsx
import { PieChart, PieArcSeries } from 'reaviz';

const data = [
  { key: 'DLP', data: 13 },
  { key: 'SIEM', data: 2 },
  { key: 'Mail', data: 8 }
];

<PieChart
  width={350}
  height={250}
  data={data}
  series={<PieArcSeries colorScheme="cybertron" />}
/>
```

**Donut Chart:**
```tsx
import { PieChart, PieArcSeries } from 'reaviz';

<PieChart
  width={350}
  height={250}
  data={data}
  series={<PieArcSeries doughnut={true} colorScheme="cybertron" />}
/>
```

---

### Radar Chart

Radar/spider charts for multivariate data comparison.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/radar

**Props:**
```typescript
interface RadarChartProps extends RadialAreaChartProps {
  /** Data the chart will receive to render. */
  data: ChartNestedDataShape[];
}
```

Inherits all props from RadialAreaChartProps.

**Basic usage:**
```tsx
import { RadarChart } from 'reaviz';

const data = [
  {
    key: 'Series 1',
    data: [
      { key: 'Speed', data: 80 },
      { key: 'Reliability', data: 90 },
      { key: 'Comfort', data: 70 },
      { key: 'Safety', data: 85 },
      { key: 'Efficiency', data: 75 }
    ]
  }
];

<RadarChart data={data} height={500} width={500} />
```

---

### Radial Area Chart

Radial area visualizations plotted on a circular axis.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/radial-area-chart

**Props:**
```typescript
interface RadialAreaChartProps extends ChartProps {
  /** Data the chart will receive to render. */
  data: ChartDataShape[];
  /** The series component that renders the area components. */
  series: ReactElement<RadialAreaSeriesProps, typeof RadialAreaSeries>;
  /** The inner radius for the chart center (0-1 as fraction of radius). */
  innerRadius: number;
  /** The radial axis component. */
  axis: ReactElement<RadialAxisProps, typeof RadialAxis> | null;
  /** Start angle for the first value. */
  startAngle?: number;
  /** End angle for the last value. */
  endAngle?: number;
  /** Whether the curve should be closed. */
  isClosedCurve?: boolean;
}
```

**Default values:**
- `innerRadius`: `0.1`
- `series`: `<RadialAreaSeries />`
- `axis`: `<RadialAxis />`
- `margins`: `75`
- `startAngle`: `0`
- `endAngle`: `2 * Math.PI`
- `isClosedCurve`: `true`

**Basic usage:**
```tsx
import {
  RadialAreaChart,
  RadialAreaSeries,
  RadialArea,
  RadialAxis,
  RadialAxisArcSeries,
  RadialAxisTickSeries,
  RadialAxisTick,
  RadialAxisTickLine,
  RadialAxisTickLabel,
  RadialGradient
} from 'reaviz';

<RadialAreaChart
  height={500}
  width={500}
  data={dateData}
  innerRadius={0.1}
  series={
    <RadialAreaSeries
      colorScheme="cybertron"
      animated
      interpolation="smooth"
      area={<RadialArea gradient={<RadialGradient />} />}
    />
  }
  axis={
    <RadialAxis
      arcs={<RadialAxisArcSeries count={10} />}
      ticks={
        <RadialAxisTickSeries
          count={5}
          tick={
            <RadialAxisTick
              line={<RadialAxisTickLine position="inside" />}
              label={<RadialAxisTickLabel autoRotate />}
            />
          }
        />
      }
    />
  }
/>
```

---

### Radial Bar Chart

Radial/circular bar charts plotted on a circular axis.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/radial-bar-chart

**Props:**
```typescript
interface RadialBarChartProps extends ChartProps {
  /** Data the chart will receive to render. */
  data: ChartDataShape[];
  /** The series component that renders the bar components. */
  series: ReactElement<RadialBarSeriesProps, typeof RadialBarSeries>;
  /** The radial axis component. */
  axis: ReactElement<RadialAxisProps, typeof RadialAxis> | null;
  /** The inner radius for the chart center. */
  innerRadius: number;
  /** Start angle for the first value. */
  startAngle?: number;
  /** End angle for the last value. */
  endAngle?: number;
}
```

**Default values:**
- `innerRadius`: `10`
- `series`: `<RadialBarSeries />`
- `axis`: `<RadialAxis />`
- `margins`: `75`

**Basic usage:**
```tsx
import {
  RadialBarChart,
  RadialBarSeries,
  RadialBar,
  RadialAxis,
  RadialAxisArcSeries,
  RadialAxisTickSeries,
  RadialAxisTick,
  RadialAxisTickLine
} from 'reaviz';

<RadialBarChart
  height={450}
  width={450}
  innerRadius={50}
  data={dateData}
  series={
    <RadialBarSeries
      animated
      bar={<RadialBar curved={false} gradient={false} guide={null} />}
    />
  }
  axis={
    <RadialAxis
      ticks={
        <RadialAxisTickSeries
          tick={
            <RadialAxisTick line={<RadialAxisTickLine position="inside" />} />
          }
        />
      }
      arcs={<RadialAxisArcSeries count={10} />}
    />
  }
/>
```

---

### Radial Gauge

Radial gauge indicators for displaying a value within a circular range.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/radial-gauge

**Props:**
```typescript
interface RadialGaugeProps extends ChartProps {
  /** Data the chart will receive to render. */
  data: ChartDataShape[];
  /** Min value to scale on. */
  minValue?: number | number[];
  /** Max value to scale on. */
  maxValue?: number | number[];
  /** Start angle for the first value. */
  startAngle?: number;
  /** End angle for the last value. */
  endAngle?: number;
  /** Gauge series component to render. */
  series?: ReactElement<
    RadialGaugeSeriesProps | StackedRadialGaugeSeriesProps,
    typeof RadialGaugeSeries | typeof StackedRadialGaugeSeries
  >;
}
```

**Default values:**
- `minValue`: `0`
- `maxValue`: `100`
- `startAngle`: `0`
- `endAngle`: `Math.PI * 2`
- `series`: `<RadialGaugeSeries />`

**Basic usage:**
```tsx
import { RadialGauge, RadialGaugeSeries } from 'reaviz';

<RadialGauge
  data={[{ key: 'Austin, TX', data: 24 }]}
  startAngle={0}
  endAngle={Math.PI * 2}
  height={300}
  width={300}
  minValue={0}
  maxValue={100}
  series={<RadialGaugeSeries arcWidth={10} colorScheme={['#418AD7']} />}
/>
```

---

### Radial Scatter Plot

Polar scatter plots on a circular axis.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/radial-scatter-plot

**Props:**
```typescript
interface RadialScatterPlotProps extends ChartProps {
  /** Data the chart will receive to render. */
  data: ChartShallowDataShape[];
  /** The series component that renders the scatter components. */
  series: ReactElement<RadialScatterSeriesProps, typeof RadialScatterSeries>;
  /** The radial axis component. */
  axis: ReactElement<RadialAxisProps, typeof RadialAxis> | null;
  /** The inner radius for the chart center. */
  innerRadius: number;
}
```

**Basic usage:**
```tsx
import {
  RadialScatterPlot,
  RadialScatterSeries,
  RadialScatterPoint,
  RadialAxis,
  RadialAxisArcSeries,
  RadialAxisTickSeries,
  RadialAxisTick,
  RadialAxisTickLine
} from 'reaviz';

<RadialScatterPlot
  height={450}
  width={450}
  data={dateData}
  innerRadius={80}
  series={
    <RadialScatterSeries
      animated
      point={<RadialScatterPoint size={5} color="rgba(45, 96, 232, .8)" />}
    />
  }
  axis={
    <RadialAxis
      ticks={
        <RadialAxisTickSeries
          count={5}
          tick={
            <RadialAxisTick line={<RadialAxisTickLine position="inside" />} />
          }
        />
      }
      arcs={<RadialAxisArcSeries count={10} />}
    />
  }
/>
```

---

### Sankey Plot

Flow/sankey diagrams for visualizing flow quantities between nodes.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/sankey-plot

**Props:**
```typescript
interface SankeyProps extends ChartProps {
  /** Whether to animate the enter/update/exit. */
  animated?: boolean;
  /** Color scheme for the nodes. */
  colorScheme?: ColorSchemeType;
  /** The node alignment method. */
  justification?: 'justify' | 'left' | 'right' | 'center';
  /** Width of the node. */
  nodeWidth?: number;
  /** Vertical padding between nodes in the same column. */
  nodePadding?: number;
  /** Label position. */
  labelPosition?: 'inside' | 'outside';
  /** Sort function for the nodes. */
  nodeSort?: (a: any, b: any) => number;
  /** Nodes that are rendered. */
  nodes: ReactElement<SankeyNodeProps>[];
  /** Links that are rendered. */
  links: ReactElement<SankeyLinkProps>[];
}
```

**Default values:**
- `animated`: `true`
- `justification`: `'justify'`
- `nodeWidth`: `15`
- `nodePadding`: `10`
- `labelPosition`: `'inside'`

**Basic usage:**
```tsx
import { Sankey, SankeyNode, SankeyLink, SankeyLabel } from 'reaviz';

const nodes = [
  { title: 'A1', id: '1' },
  { title: 'A2', id: '2' },
  { title: 'B1', id: '3' },
  { title: 'B2', id: '4' }
];

const links = [
  { source: '1', target: '3', value: 8 },
  { source: '1', target: '4', value: 4 },
  { source: '2', target: '3', value: 2 },
  { source: '2', target: '4', value: 7 }
];

<Sankey
  colorScheme="Spectral"
  height={300}
  width={550}
  nodeWidth={5}
  labelPosition="outside"
  nodes={nodes.map((node, i) => (
    <SankeyNode key={`node-${i}`} {...node} label={<SankeyLabel />} />
  ))}
  links={links.map((link, i) => (
    <SankeyLink key={`link-${i}`} {...link} />
  ))}
/>
```

---

### Scatter Plot

Scatter/bubble plots for correlation analysis.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/scatter-plot

**Props:**
```typescript
interface ScatterPlotProps extends ChartProps {
  /** Data the chart will receive to render. */
  data: ChartShallowDataShape[];
  /** The series component that renders the scatter components. */
  series: ReactElement<ScatterSeriesProps, typeof ScatterSeries>;
  /** The linear axis component for the Y Axis. */
  yAxis: ReactElement<LinearAxisProps, typeof LinearAxis>;
  /** The linear axis component for the X Axis. */
  xAxis: ReactElement<LinearAxisProps, typeof LinearAxis>;
  /** The chart's background gridlines. */
  gridlines: ReactElement<GridlineSeriesProps, typeof GridlineSeries> | null;
  /** The chart's brush component. */
  brush: ReactElement<ChartBrushProps, typeof ChartBrush> | null;
  /** The chart's zoom pan component. */
  zoomPan: ReactElement<ChartZoomPanProps, typeof ChartZoomPan> | null;
  /** Secondary axis components for multi-axis charts. */
  secondaryAxis?: ReactElement<LinearAxisProps, typeof LinearAxis>[];
}
```

**Default values:**
- `xAxis`: `<LinearXAxis type="time" />`
- `yAxis`: `<LinearYAxis type="value" />`
- `series`: `<ScatterSeries />`
- `gridlines`: `<GridlineSeries />`

**Basic usage:**
```tsx
import { ScatterPlot, ScatterSeries, ScatterPoint } from 'reaviz';
import { schemes } from 'reaviz';

<ScatterPlot
  height={400}
  width={750}
  data={signalData}
  series={
    <ScatterSeries
      point={<ScatterPoint color={schemes.cybertron[0]} size={4} />}
    />
  }
/>
```

---

### Sparkline

Inline sparkline charts for compact trend visualization.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/spark-line

**Variants:** SparklineChart (line), AreaSparklineChart, BarSparklineChart, SonarChart

**Props:** Extends LineChartProps.

```typescript
interface SparklineChartProps extends LineChartProps {
  /** Data the chart will receive to render. */
  data: ChartShallowDataShape[];
}
```

**Basic usage:**
```tsx
import { SparklineChart } from 'reaviz';

<SparklineChart width={200} height={55} data={dateData} />
```

**Area Sparkline:**
```tsx
import { AreaSparklineChart } from 'reaviz';

<AreaSparklineChart width={200} height={55} data={dateData} />
```

**Bar Sparkline:**
```tsx
import { BarSparklineChart } from 'reaviz';

<BarSparklineChart width={200} height={85} data={dateData} />
```

---

### Sunburst Chart

Hierarchical sunburst visualizations for nested data.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/sunburst-chart

**Props:**
```typescript
interface SunburstChartProps extends ChartProps {
  /** Data the chart will receive to render. */
  data: ChartShallowDataShape[] | ChartNestedDataShape[];
  /** The series component that renders the components. */
  series?: ReactElement<SunburstSeriesProps, typeof SunburstSeries>;
}
```

**Basic usage:**
```tsx
import { SunburstChart } from 'reaviz';

<SunburstChart height={450} width={450} data={nestedData} />
```

---

### Tree Map

Hierarchical treemap visualizations for proportional nested data.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/tree-map

**Props:**
```typescript
interface TreeMapProps extends ChartProps {
  /** Data the chart will receive to render. */
  data: ChartShallowDataShape[] | ChartNestedDataShape[];
  /** The series component that renders the components. */
  series?: ReactElement<TreeMapSeriesProps, typeof TreeMapSeries>;
  /** Inner padding. Defaults to 5. */
  paddingInner?: number;
  /** Outer padding. Defaults to 5. */
  paddingOuter?: number;
  /** Padding top for title spacing in nested situations. Defaults to 30. */
  paddingTop?: number;
}
```

**Basic usage:**
```tsx
import { TreeMap, TreeMapSeries } from 'reaviz';

<TreeMap
  height={450}
  width={450}
  data={[
    { key: 'AWS', data: 100 },
    { key: 'SendGrid', data: 45 },
    { key: 'Okta', data: 75 },
    { key: 'Twilio', data: 25 }
  ]}
  series={<TreeMapSeries colorScheme="cybertron" />}
/>
```

---

### Venn Diagram

Set intersection diagrams for showing relationships between data sets.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/venn-diagram

**Props:**
```typescript
interface VennDiagramData {
  /** List of Keys for the data. */
  key: string[];
  /** Size of the data keys. */
  data: number;
}

interface VennDiagramProps extends ChartProps {
  /** Type of the chart. */
  type?: 'venn' | 'euler' | 'starEuler';
  /** Data the chart will receive to render. */
  data: VennDiagramData[];
  /** The series component that renders the arc and label components. */
  series?: ReactElement<VennSeriesProps, typeof VennSeries> | null;
  /** Whether the chart is disabled. */
  disabled?: boolean;
}
```

**Basic usage:**
```tsx
import { VennDiagram, VennSeries, VennArc, VennLabel, Gradient } from 'reaviz';

<VennDiagram
  height={450}
  width={450}
  data={[
    { key: ['A'], data: 12 },
    { key: ['B'], data: 12 },
    { key: ['A', 'B'], data: 2 }
  ]}
  series={
    <VennSeries
      colorScheme="cybertron"
      arc={<VennArc strokeWidth={3} gradient={<Gradient />} />}
      label={<VennLabel labelType="key" showAll={false} />}
    />
  }
/>
```

---

### Word Cloud

Word/tag cloud visualizations for text frequency data.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/charts/word-cloud

**Props:**
```typescript
interface WordCloudProps extends ChartProps {
  /** Data to render. 'key' = word, 'data' = frequency/weight. */
  data: ChartShallowDataShape[];
  /** Font size range [min, max]. */
  fontSizeRange?: [number, number];
  /** Font family. */
  fontFamily?: string;
  /** Padding between words. */
  padding?: number;
  /** Rotation angle range [min, max]. */
  rotationAngles?: [number, number];
  /** Number of possible rotations. */
  rotations?: number;
  /** Custom color scheme. */
  colorScheme?: string[];
  /** Click handler. */
  onLabelClick?: (event: React.MouseEvent, data: ChartShallowDataShape) => void;
}
```

**Default values:**
- `fontSizeRange`: `[12, 50]`
- `fontFamily`: `'Arial'`
- `padding`: `3`
- `rotationAngles`: `[-30, 30]`
- `rotations`: `2`

**Basic usage:**
```tsx
import { WordCloud } from 'reaviz';

<WordCloud
  data={[
    { key: 'React', data: 100 },
    { key: 'JavaScript', data: 85 },
    { key: 'TypeScript', data: 80 },
    { key: 'D3.js', data: 75 },
    { key: 'HTML', data: 70 },
    { key: 'CSS', data: 65 },
    { key: 'Node.js', data: 60 }
  ]}
  width={600}
  height={400}
/>
```

---

## Utils

### Axis

Linear and radial axis components for chart positioning and scale labeling.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/utils/axis

**Linear Axis components:**
- `LinearXAxis` / `LinearYAxis` - Main axis components
- `LinearXAxisTickSeries` / `LinearYAxisTickSeries` - Tick mark series
- `LinearXAxisTickLabel` / `LinearYAxisTickLabel` - Tick labels
- `LinearXAxisTickLine` / `LinearYAxisTickLine` - Tick lines

**Radial Axis components:**
- `RadialAxis` - Main radial axis
- `RadialAxisTickSeries` - Tick marks on radial axis
- `RadialAxisTick` - Individual tick
- `RadialAxisTickLabel` - Tick labels
- `RadialAxisTickLine` - Tick lines
- `RadialAxisArcSeries` - Concentric arc gridlines

**Axis types:**
- `'category'` - For categorical/discrete data (uses scaleBand)
- `'value'` - For numeric data (uses scaleLinear)
- `'time'` - For date/time data (uses scaleTime)
- `'duration'` - For duration data

**Example - Customizing axis:**
```tsx
import {
  LinearXAxis,
  LinearXAxisTickSeries,
  LinearXAxisTickLabel,
  LinearYAxis
} from 'reaviz';

<BarChart
  xAxis={
    <LinearXAxis
      type="category"
      tickSeries={
        <LinearXAxisTickSeries
          tickSize={20}
          label={<LinearXAxisTickLabel rotation={-45} />}
        />
      }
    />
  }
  yAxis={<LinearYAxis type="value" />}
/>
```

---

### Brush

Selection brush for zooming into chart regions.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/utils/brush

**Usage:**
```tsx
import { AreaChart, ChartBrush } from 'reaviz';

<AreaChart
  brush={<ChartBrush />}
  data={data}
/>
```

---

### Gridlines

Chart gridlines for reference.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/utils/grid-lines

**Components:**
- `GridlineSeries` - Container for gridlines
- `Gridline` - Individual gridline
- `GridStripe` - Alternating background stripes

**Example:**
```tsx
import { GridlineSeries, Gridline, GridStripe } from 'reaviz';

<AreaChart
  gridlines={
    <GridlineSeries
      line={<Gridline direction="y" />}
      stripe={<GridStripe direction="y" />}
    />
  }
/>
```

---

### Legends

Chart legends for identifying data series.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/utils/legends

**Components:**
- `DiscreteLegend` - Legend for categorical data
- `DiscreteLegendEntry` - Individual legend entry
- `DiscreteLegendSymbol` - Legend color indicator
- `SequentialLegend` - Legend for continuous data (color scales)

**Example:**
```tsx
import {
  DiscreteLegend,
  DiscreteLegendEntry,
  DiscreteLegendSymbol
} from 'reaviz';

<DiscreteLegend
  orientation="horizontal"
  entries={[
    <DiscreteLegendEntry
      label="Series 1"
      symbol={<DiscreteLegendSymbol />}
      color="#418AD7"
    />,
    <DiscreteLegendEntry
      label="Series 2"
      symbol={<DiscreteLegendSymbol />}
      color="#993DCF"
    />
  ]}
/>
```

---

### Tooltips

Tooltip customization for interactive data display.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/utils/tooltips

**Components:**
- `ChartTooltip` - Styled tooltip container
- `TooltipArea` - Interactive area that triggers tooltips
- `TooltipTemplate` - Default tooltip content template

**Example:**
```tsx
import { AreaChart, AreaSeries, TooltipArea, ChartTooltip } from 'reaviz';

<AreaChart
  series={
    <AreaSeries
      tooltip={
        <TooltipArea
          tooltip={
            <ChartTooltip
              content={(data) => `${data.key}: ${data.value}`}
            />
          }
        />
      }
    />
  }
/>
```

---

### Zoom Pan

Zoom and pan controls for navigating large datasets.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/utils/zoom-pan

**Usage:**
```tsx
import { AreaChart, ChartZoomPan } from 'reaviz';

<AreaChart
  zoomPan={<ChartZoomPan />}
  data={data}
/>
```

---

### Gradient

SVG gradient fills for chart elements.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/utils/gradient

**Components:**
- `Gradient` - Linear SVG gradient
- `GradientStop` - Individual gradient stop
- `RadialGradient` - Radial SVG gradient

**Example:**
```tsx
import { Gradient, GradientStop } from 'reaviz';

<AreaSeries
  area={
    <Area
      gradient={
        <Gradient
          stops={[
            <GradientStop offset="0%" stopOpacity={0.2} />,
            <GradientStop offset="100%" stopOpacity={0.8} />
          ]}
        />
      }
    />
  }
/>
```

---

### Glow

Glow effects for chart elements.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/utils/glow

---

### Mark Line

Reference/threshold lines for marking specific values on charts.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/utils/mark-line

---

### Mask

SVG masking and pattern fills.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/utils/mask

**Components:**
- `Stripes` - Striped pattern mask
- `Mask` - General SVG mask

---

### Value Marker

Value annotation markers for highlighting specific data points.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/utils/value-marker

---

### Count

Animated count displays for numeric values.

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/docs/utils/count

---

## Blocks

Pre-built composable chart patterns providing ready-to-use chart compositions in both light and dark themes at multiple sizes (Large, Medium, Small, X-Small).

**Docs:** https://reaviz.dev/blocks

Available block types:
- **Area Chart Blocks** - https://reaviz.dev/blocks/charts/area-chart
- **Bar Chart Blocks** - https://reaviz.dev/blocks/charts/bar-chart
- **Funnel Chart Blocks** - https://reaviz.dev/blocks/charts/funnel-chart
- **Heatmap Blocks** - https://reaviz.dev/blocks/charts/heatmap
- **Scatter Plot Blocks** - https://reaviz.dev/blocks/charts/scatter-plot

---

## Color Schemes

REAVIZ ships with built-in color schemes accessible via the `schemes` export:

```tsx
import { schemes } from 'reaviz';

// Use a named scheme
<BarSeries colorScheme="cybertron" />

// Use scheme colors directly
<ScatterPoint color={schemes.cybertron[0]} />

// Use a D3 color scheme name
<HeatmapSeries colorScheme="OrRd" />

// Use custom colors array
<PieArcSeries colorScheme={['#418AD7', '#993DCF', '#2ECC71']} />
```

---

## Related Libraries

- [Reagraph](https://reagraph.dev): Network graph visualizations for React (WebGL)
- [Reaflow](https://reaflow.dev): Workflow and diagram editor for React
- [Reablocks](https://reablocks.dev): Tailwind-based React component library
- [Reachat](https://reachat.dev): LLM/Chat UI components for React

## Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/reaviz/reaviz)
- [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/reaviz)
- [Storybook](https://storybook.reaviz.dev)
- [Changelog](https://reaviz.dev/docs/changelog)
- [Support](https://reaviz.dev/docs/support)
